final_explanation:
Based on the AI model's prediction,
The fact that loan duration is longer, because extended repayment horizons heighten exposure to financial deterioration, is known in the literature as a signal that increases credit risk, but the model instead identifies it as a factor that decreases risk.[1]
The fact that there are no known savings, because lower savings categories are positively associated with higher estimated credit risk, is known in the literature as a signal that increases credit risk, but the model instead identifies it as a factor that decreases risk.[2]
The fact that there is no checking account, because applicants without a checking account exhibit reduced risk relative to the reference category, is known in the literature as a signal that decreases credit risk, but the model instead identifies it as a factor that increases risk.[3]
Overall, this applicant is likely to have a low risk of default.

final_explanation_ko:
본 AI가 예측한 결과에 따르면,\n대출 기간이 길수록 재정 악화에 대한 노출이 커져 신용 위험 신호로 인식되지만, 본 모델은 이를 위험 감소 요인으로 판단합니다 [1].
저축 내역이 없는 경우, 저축 부족이 신용 위험 증가 신호로 여겨지지만, 본 모델은 이를 위험 감소 요인으로 해석합니다 [2].
입출금 계좌가 없는 경우, 일반적으로 위험 감소 요인으로 간주되지만, 본 모델은 이를 위험 증가 요인으로 평가합니다 [3].
전반적으로 이 고객은 채무 불이행 위험이 낮은 수준으로 평가됩니다.
